description: OVN-Kubernetes CNI and OVS network health metrics via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Single static instance. OVN-K metrics available on OCP 4.12+ with OVN-Kubernetes CNI (default). CNI request P99 converted to milliseconds. Southbound DB connectivity uses min() to alert if any node loses connection.
name: OCP_OVN_Network_Health
